chunks.text: Course: EE 197 | EECS at UC Berkeley EE 197. Field Study Catalog Description: Students take part in organized individual field sponsored programs with off-campus companies or tutoring/mentoring relevant to specific aspects and applications of compute

nt to specific aspects and applications of computer science on or off campus. Note Summer CPT or OPT students: written report required. Course does not count toward major requirements, but will be counted in the cumulative units toward graduation. Un

nted in the cumulative units toward graduation. Units: 1-4 Also Offered As: ELENG 197 Prerequisites: Consent of instructor (see department adviser). Formats: Summer: 2-7.5 hours of fieldwork per week Spring: 1-4 hours of fieldwork per week Fall: 1-4

Spring: 1-4 hours of fieldwork per week Fall: 1-4 hours of fieldwork per week Summer: 2.5-10 hours of fieldwork per week Grading Basis: Pass/Not Pass Final Exam Status: No Class Schedule (Spring 2026): EE 197-30 – Kristofer S J Pister , Sophia Shao E
